---
title: "EFSA Format v2"
subtitle: "Data format of the FHF marine sediment data model"
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
th {
  white-space: nowrap;
}
```

The page presents the column format of the FHF marine sediment data model for submitting background sediment trace element data.

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(knitr)

readMe <- tribble(
  ~`Field Label`,       ~`Field Name`,                                                    ~Description,                                                          ~Catalogue,          ~Optionality,
  "sampleId",           "Sample Unique Identifier",                                       "Sample identification according to the data provider.",               NA,                  "Recommended",
  "samplingStrategy",   "Sampling Strategy (yes/no)",                                     "Whether a defined sampling strategy was applied.",                    "yesNoMaybe",        "Recommended",
  "pristine",           "Pristine",                                                       "Whether the area sampled was unaffected by pollution.",               "yesNoMaybe",        "Mandatory",
  "collDate",           "Date of Collection",                                              "Date of sample collection.",                                          NA,                  "Mandatory",
  "placeColl",          "Place of Collection",                                             "Sea area where the sample was collected.",                            "seas",              "Mandatory",
  "lat",                "Geographic Coordinate Latitude",                                  "Latitude in decimal degrees.",                                        NA,                  "Recommended",
  "lon",                "Geographic Coordinate Longitude",                                 "Longitude in decimal degrees.",                                       NA,                  "Recommended",
  "sedDepth",           "Depth of Sediment Sample (below sediment level)",                "Depth category of the sample below the sediment surface.",            "sedDepth",          "Mandatory",
  "traceEl",            "Trace Element",                                                   "Trace element measured.",                                             NA,                  "Mandatory",
  "value",              "Measured Value",                                                  "Analytical result of the concentration.",                             NA,                  "Mandatory",
  "sd",                 "SD",                                                              "Standard deviation of the measurement.",                              NA,                  "Optional",
  "unit",               "Unit (e.g. mg/kg)",                                               "Unit of the measured value.",                                         NA,                  "Mandatory",
  "resultType",         "Expression of Result Type (e.g. wet weight or dry weight)",       "Whether the result is expressed as wet weight or dry weight.",        NA,                  "Recommended",
  "moisture",           "% Moisture",                                                      "Moisture content of the sample (%).",                                 NA,                  "Recommended",
  "convertedValue",     "Converted Values into mg/kg Dry Weight",                          "Measured value converted to mg/kg dry weight.",                       NA,                  "Mandatory",
  "extractionClass",    "Extraction Class",                                                "Strength of the extraction method applied.",                          "extractionClass",   "Mandatory",
  "methAn",             "Analytical Method",                                               "Method used to measure the concentration.",                           "methAn",            "Mandatory",
  "validatedMethod",    "Validated Method (yes/no)",                                       "Whether the analytical method is validated.",                         "yesNoMaybe",        "Recommended",
  "LOD",                "LOD",                                                             "Limit of detection.",                                                 NA,                  "Mandatory",
  "LODUnit",            "Units of the LOD",                                                "Unit of the limit of detection.",                                     NA,                  "Mandatory",
  "LOQ",                "LOQ",                                                             "Limit of quantification.",                                            NA,                  "Recommended",
  "LOQUnit",            "Units of the LOQ",                                                "Unit of the limit of quantification.",                                NA,                  "Recommended",
  "accLab",             "Accredited Laboratory/Quality Control (yes/no)",                  "Whether the laboratory is accredited.",                               "yesNoMaybe",        "Mandatory",
  "phSed",              "pH of Porewater",                                                 "Measured pH of porewater in the sediment.",                           NA,                  "Optional",
  "sieve",              "Sieve <63µm",                                                     "Whether the sample was sieved at <63µm.",                             "yesNoNotReported",  "Mandatory",
  "bulkAnalysis",       "Bulk Analysis",                                                   "Whether bulk analysis was performed.",                                "yesNoNotReported",  "Mandatory",
  "ocSed",              "Organic Matter Content Sediment (TOC%)",                          "Organic matter content of the sediment (TOC%).",                      NA,                  "Mandatory",
  "notes",              "Notes",                                                           "Open notes field.",                                                   NA,                  "Recommended"
)

readMe <- readMe %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~coalesce(.x, "")))

readMe <- readMe %>%
  mutate(Catalogue = ifelse(Catalogue != "", paste0("<a href='#", Catalogue, "'>", Catalogue, "</a>"), ""))

yesNoMaybe <- tribble(
  ~`Value`,
  "yes",
  "no",
  "maybe"
)

seas <- tribble(
  ~`Sea Name`,
  "Adriatic Sea",
  "Aegean Sea",
  "Alboran Sea (South West Mediterranean)",
  "Arctic Ocean",
  "Baltic Sea",
  "Black Sea",
  "Cantabrian Sea",
  "East Atlantic",
  "English Channel",
  "Golf of Bothnia",
  "Golf of Finland",
  "Ionian Sea",
  "Ligurian Sea (North Tyrrhenian Sea)",
  "Marmara Sea",
  "North Sea",
  "Norwegian Sea",
  "South East Mediterranean",
  "Tyrrhenian Sea",
  "West Mediterranean"
)

sedDepth <- tribble(
  ~`Value`,
  "0-5cm",
  "5-40cm",
  ">40cm"
)

extractionClass <- tribble(
  ~`Value`,              ~Description,
  "1 - Strong",          "Strong extraction",
  "2 - Milder",          "Milder extraction",
  "3 - Weak or none",    "Weak or no extraction"
)

methAn <- tribble(
  ~`Method`,
  "ICP-AES",
  "ICP-MS",
  "AAS",
  "WD-XRFS",
  "Other"
)

yesNoNotReported <- tribble(
  ~`Value`,
  "yes",
  "no",
  "not reported"
)
```

## Column Format

```{r}
knitr::kable(readMe, escape = FALSE)
```

## Catalogue Data

### yesNoMaybe {#yesNoMaybe}

```{r}
yesNoMaybe
```

### seas {#seas}

```{r}
seas
```

### sedDepth {#sedDepth}

```{r}
sedDepth
```

### extractionClass {#extractionClass}

```{r}
extractionClass
```

### methAn {#methAn}

```{r}
methAn
```

### yesNoNotReported {#yesNoNotReported}

```{r}
yesNoNotReported
```
